label: amazon_in_headphones_third_addtocart
task: Search for 'wireless headphones' on Amazon India. Open the third product in the results. Report the product title, the visible price (in ₹), and whether an 'Add to Cart' or 'Buy Now' button is present.

label: amazon_in_bookshelf_filter_open
task: Search 'bookshelf' on Amazon India. Apply a price filter of ₹2000 or below if available. Open the first result. Report its title, price (₹), and average rating.

label: swiggy_pizza_first_restaurant_menu
task: Set the delivery location to any Bangalore address on Swiggy. Search for 'pizza'. Open the first restaurant. From its menu, find any 'Margherita' (or first pizza item if no Margherita). Report the restaurant name, the pizza name, and its price (₹).

label: bookmyshow_mumbai_hindi_movie_card
task: Set location to Mumbai on BookMyShow. Find the Movies / Now Showing section. Open the first Hindi-language movie shown. Report the movie name, certificate (U/UA/A), and the visible runtime (minutes).

label: lego_starwars_75407_addtobag
task: On LEGO India, navigate to the Star Wars theme. Open the first product card. Report its product code, name, and price (₹). Do not actually checkout — just inspect the product page.

label: lego_search_open_first_product
task: Use the LEGO search bar to search 'speed champions'. Open the first product result. Report the product name, product code, and price (₹) on the detail page.
